Privacy Policy

Effective Date: July 2, 2026

At Krushna Homoeopathic Clinic, patient confidentiality and trust are of paramount importance. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, store, protect, and handle your medical history and personal data when you consult with us or use our website.

1. Information We Collect

To provide high-quality, individualized Homoeopathic care, we collect the following types of information:

  • Personal Details: Name, contact number, email address, age, gender, and residential location.
  • Medical History: Comprehensive records of current symptoms, past illnesses, family health history, psychological profiles, dietary habits, and general physical sensitivities.
  • Consultation Case Files: Case-taking records, prescription histories, and follow-up clinical reports recorded during appointments.

2. How We Use Your Data

We strictly use collected clinical and personal data to formulate constitutional Homoeopathic treatment regimens, track progress, manage appointment schedules, and contact you for medical follow-ups.

3. Absolute Patient Confidentiality

Your records are kept completely private. Case details, medical reports, and identity files are held in secure clinical storage and are never disclosed, shared, or sold to third-party marketing services or other organizations, except under the following conditions:

  • With your explicit, written consent.
  • When required under applicable clinical regulations or legal mandates.

4. Web Forms & Security

Data submitted through our online booking forms, appointment requests, or WhatsApp links is encrypted and processed over HTTPS. Physical and digital clinical records are restricted to authorized personnel only.

5. Patient Rights

You reserve the right to review, update, or request corrections to your medical files. For inquiries regarding data storage or case files, please reach out directly via shravanikadam27@gmail.com.

Terms & Conditions

Effective Date: July 2, 2026

Welcome to Krushna Homoeopathic Clinic. By scheduling a consultation, accessing our website, or using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms and Conditions.

1. Professional Medical Disclaimer

Homoeopathic treatment is highly individualized. The contents of this website (including articles, condition descriptions, and FAQs) are for educational purposes only and do not constitute direct medical advice or diagnostics.

A personal consultation with a qualified Homoeopathic physician is mandatory before starting any constitutional remedy. Never self-prescribe or substitute professional medical care with website content.

2. Consultation Bookings & Fees

Appointments can be booked online, via WhatsApp, or over phone. Patients are requested to provide accurate personal details and clinical backgrounds during case-taking. Cancellation or rescheduling of appointments must be notified at least 24 hours in advance.

3. Compliance with Treatment

Homoeopathic remedies work dynamically to stimulate the body's natural vital force. Patients are advised to follow the dosage, potency instructions, and dietary restrictions specified by the doctor to achieve optimal therapeutic results.

4. Intellectual Property

All assets on this website, including text content, illustrations, custom layout styling, logo icon designs, and clinical photography, are the intellectual property of Krushna Homoeopathic Clinic and may not be reproduced without written authorization.

5. Jurisdiction

Any disputes arising from services, consultations, or usage of this website will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Pune, Maharashtra, India.
